tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Nick Jonas - Chains
Tuning: Standard (E A D G B E)
Arranged key: A minor (A B C D E F G A)
Original key: C minor (C D Eb F G Ab Bb C), either put a capo on the third fret or transpose to +3
Tempo: 76 bpm
Transcribed by Robert from Astlessons


[Intro]

[ch]Am[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
With her wine-stained lips, yeah she's nothing but trouble[/tab]
Cold to the touch but she's warm as a devil
I gave her my heart but she wanted my soul
She takes 'til I break and I can't get more


[Chorus 1]

[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
You got me in chains, you got me in chains for your love[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
But I wouldn't change, no I wouldn't change this love[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Got me in chains, you got me in chains for your love[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]

Tryna break the chains, but the chains only wring me

Hey, hey, hey, (hey) tryna break the chains but the chains only wring me[/tab]

Baby tell me why, why you do, do me wrong
Gave you my heart but you took my soul

Chords:
Am   (X 0 2 2 1 X) or (5 7 7 5 5 5)
F    (1 3 3 2 1 1) or (X X 3 2 1 1) or simplify with Fmaj7 (X X 3 2 1 0)
G    (3 2 0 0 0 3) or (3 2 0 0 3 3) or (3 5 5 4 3 3)
Dm   (X X 0 2 3 1) or (X 5 7 7 6 5)

Chords in C minor (transposed to +3):
Cm   (X 3 5 5 4 3) or (8 10 10 8 8 8) or simplify with (X X X 5 4 3)
G#   (4 6 6 5 4 4) or simplify with (X X X 5 4 4) (correct name is Ab)
A#   (X 1 3 3 3 1) or (6 8 8 7 6 6) or simplify with (X X X 7 6 6) (correct name is Bb)
Fm   (1 3 3 1 1 1) or simplify with (X X 3 1 1 1)

Clarification:
Chordname (E A D G B E)
X = Don't play / Muffle
